narrative:
Sylvania municipal court district has 58,566 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.3% D−R vs -0.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
